reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio, buena atención, todo limpio y bien cuidado. Prueben el sánguche en pan de campo de crudo y queso 👌🏽

(Translated by Google)
Excellent gas station, great service, everything clean and well-maintained. Try the ham and cheese sandwich on country bread 👌🏽

reviews.comment:
Baños divinos, chiquitos pero muy limpios y con todo lo necesario.
Playero muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
Lovely bathrooms, small but very clean and with everything you need.
Very friendly beach attendant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1NFZYUkpNM0Z3ZWpZemRWVk1aamRQV2toU1NVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una reverenda ca ga da el sistema para cargar agua caliente para mate, me salpicó y me quema los brazos.

(Translated by Google)
The system for filling up with hot water for mate is a total mess; it splashed on me and burned my arms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21Gd1VFRlhUMVozVjFFdFFsb3djVTg0YkdKaVgzYxAB

reviews.comment:
Falta mas servicio por parte del personal. Y opciones de cómida fuera del típico y famoso sándwich de crudo y hamburguesas....

(Translated by Google)
The staff needs to provide better service. And there should be more food options beyond the typical and famous hamburger sandwiches and burgers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKdFFqVmhOR0p6ZUZoNE0ydEVjRFJFYTAxZlNVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Compre los antaño emblematicos sandwiches de jamon crudo. Ya no son lo que eran, un hilo de fiambre en un pan seco......Horribles! Lo peor es que le pregunte a la empleada si seguian siendo los mismos y me dijo que si....

(Translated by Google)
I bought the once-iconic prosciutto sandwiches. They're not what they used to be, just a thin sliver of ham on dry bread... Horrible! The worst part is that I asked the employee if they were still the same and she said yes...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKT1dHRk1SMUV3UkZkRmRWSklXbll4TVhCVFZHYxAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente 👌 Muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent 👌 Very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xRek1FY3hObmRTVFZWTE5XTnhjMVZ0VVRscFFuYxAB

reviews.comment:
Amigo, una poronga el "famoso" sanguche de crudo y queso🤣 Tanta fama que le hacen, no vale ni medio (o por lo menos en la actualidad). El pan seco y escaso de fetas de fiambre, pobrisimo jaja.
No se guíen por los comentarios, estoy seguro que hay mejores x la zona mejores que la YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Dude, the "famous" raw meat and cheese sandwich is a real pain 🤣 All the hype is about it, it's not worth half (or at least not these days). The bread is dry and short on slices of cold cuts, it's terrible haha.
Don't just rely on the comments; I'm sure there are better ones in the area than YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kxVWMwUkRWME10VmtKWVZGWjRkV1p2YUZNMVVsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, excelente vista, excelente el servicio de cafetería. Lo negativo es la ruta tanto de acceso como de egreso hacia el sur y viceversa. Ruta con tramos deplorables.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, excellent views, and excellent cafeteria service. The only downside is the road both on and off the southbound route. The route has some deplorable stretches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KSVdFRmpYMFJ6ZEdOMk5FNHlWSEJRT1VZMlgxRRAB
